body_txt: It has been said that laughter is the best medicine, but it can serve another purpose, as well. Laughter can be an olive branch, a way to turn an enemy into a friend, or help someone who's on the fence choose a side. It can overlap with Actually Pretty Funny , particularly if exchanging insults with the Proud Warrior Race Guy . However, sometimes it's just a simple joke or gesture that makes someone laugh and shows two sides that they've got things in common, which can be very useful for building bridges. Now, there are instances of this being done quite deliberately, with a clever and witty person knowing that a good laugh is a way to get others on their side. Other times, however, it's merely that the accidental actions of a Butt-Monkey or Bumbling Sidekick got one side laughing, and deciding that these new guys aren't so bad after all. Compare Scheherezade Gambit . Overlaps with Cheer Them Up with Laughter and Tension-Defusing Joke . May overlap with Won Over by Earnestness . Compare and contrast Too Funny to Be Evil , when it is a third party being won over with laughter. Contrast Circle of Shame , in which the group is laughing at the person instead of laughing with them. See also "Everybody Laughs" Ending .
